summary: All three requirements (REQ-23, REQ-24, REQ-25) appear to be substantially implemented. REQ-23 covers base weapon/armor values in lootGenerator.ts, equipment stat aggregation in combatEngine.ts, and CharacterSheet display. REQ-24 covers the prefix/suffix name system in monsters.ts and usage in combatEngine.ts/DungeonRunScreen.tsx. REQ-25 covers ticks-between-attacks derivation, CharacterSheet display, and DungeonRunScreen monster display. One concern exists around magDmg affixes being folded into physical attack rather than tracked separately. Overall coverage is strong.

missing_requirements.requirement: magDmg affixes on equipped items should contribute to a distinct magic damage effective stat, not be merged into physical attack damage
missing_requirements.reason: In combatEngine.ts the magDmg affix case adds its value to bonusAttack (the physical attack accumulator), conflating magic damage with physical damage in combat calculations. The CharacterSheet computes magDmg separately via a local formula but the combat engine does not maintain a separate magic damage value.

hallucinated_features.description: Expanded prefix pool (15 entries) and suffix pool (10 entries) beyond the minimums requested
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request specified at least 8 thematic prefixes and at least 6 thematic suffixes. The implementation defines 15 prefixes (adding Blighted, Savage, Wretched, Forsaken, Twisted, Dread, Infernal) and 10 suffixes (adding Champion, Marauder, Stalker, Berserker) which were not requested.
